title: COORDINATED CARE ORGANIZATIONS - 211info
text: INFORMATIONAL RECORD COORDINATED CARE ORGANIZATIONS Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF A Coordinated Care Organization (CCO) is a local Oregon Health Plan (OHP) or (Medicaid) plan that helps OHP members use their benefits. CCOs are made up of all types of healthcare providers in a community. They work together to care for OHP members in an area or region of the state. If your caller has OHP, remember to suggest contacting their CCO to find out which providers or services are covered under their plan. Confidential Address Eligibility: Oregon Health Plan recipients Hours: Not applicable Visit Website INTAKE PROCEDURE: Use the link to look up CCOs by county for medical and mental (behavioral) health, as well as dental plans. If there is more than one CCO in the area, refer to the OHP Client Services Unit. FEES: Varies by service AREA SERVED: State of Oregon Services: Dental Care Referrals * Medicaid Recipients Eye Care Referrals * Medicaid Recipients Pharmacy Referrals * Medicaid Recipients Physician Referrals * Medicaid Recipients Specialized Information and Referral * Medicaid Recipients Substance Use Disorder Referrals * Medicaid Recipients Other Services Offered At This Location: COMMUNITY ECONOMIC DEVELOPMENT AND FINANCE - SHORT-TERM RENT ASSISTANCE CRIMINAL CORRECTIONAL SYSTEM - TELMATE EDUCATIONAL SUPPORT SERVICES - SCHOOL SUPPLIES FOOD - FREE AND REDUCED COST BREAKFAST AND LUNCH FOOD - THE EMERGENCY FOOD ASSISTANCE PROGRAM INFORMATION SERVICES - COLD RELATED ILLNESS FAQ LEGAL SERVICES - NOTARY SERVICES LEGAL SERVICES - PUBLIC CHARGE INFORMATIONAL RECORD PUBLIC SAFETY - BURNING BANS If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. INFORMATIONAL RECORD
